COMMENT: CCW calculates this variable as the count of months where a beneficiary is enrolled in Medicare and 
the monthly dual status code from the MBSF did not indicate eligibility for full or partial dual 
Medicare-Medicaid benefits (i.e., where DUAL_STUS_CD_MM NOT IN ('01' '02' '03' '04' '05' '06' '08').
